The '''''Brayl''-class bulk freighter''' was a cargo hauler. A modified ''Brayl''-class bulk freighter, the ''[[Voxen Tass]]'', measured 100 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] in length, required one [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and seven other crewmembers, and carried 75,000 metric tons of cargo.

Some of these vessels were modified to serve as corvettes as part of the [[Sullustan Home Guard/Legends|Sullustan Home Guard]]<ref name="SOR" />
